_comment: Stage 3 perf snapshot — MainMenu panels (main-menu, new-game-form, save-load-view, settings-view) active on UIDocument. Framerate capture pending at full MainMenu scene load.
implementation: UI Toolkit UIDocument + VM POCO dataBindingPath (sidecar coexistence)

mainmenu_fps.note: Capture via unity:testmode-batch at MainMenu load. Must be ≥ hud-baseline.json hud_fps_at_full_city_load when populated.

panel_open_ms.note: Time from OnEnable to first frame rendered for each panel.

vm_propertychanged_per_second.note: PropertyChanged fires per second. Should stay low due to equality guards in VMs.
